narrative:
Conotton Valley-Union Local Sd (Harrison) school district has 2,118 registered voters, with 56.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 26.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 16.5%, a clear Republican lean of 10.2 percentage points.
